description: Style Note Dress your boy in this shirt from gini and jony and watch him play a game of soccer like a pro. The cut enhances the smartness quotient of this shirt, while the fabric keeps him fresh and comfortable all day. Team it with shorts and sneakers for that uber cool look. Product Details White shirt with foldable short sleeves with mid button tabs and check print on the cuffs, printed branding with stitched detailing on the right sleeve, has a tipped collar, flap buttoned pockets on the front with embroidered branding above the left pocket, full buttoned placket, press buttoned tabs on both the sides of the hem, loop detailing on the shoulders, printed branding at the back and a curved hem Material and care 100% cotton  Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery
